fewShots.question: Which renewable offtaker relationship types have the highest completed PPA settlement value?
fewShots.query:
-- Renewable offtaker performance by relationship type
SELECT
    c.CustomerRelationshipTypeId AS [Offtaker Relationship Type],
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.CustomerId) AS [Offtaker Count],
    COUNT(o.OrderId) AS [Completed Settlements],
    ROUND(SUM(o.OrderTotal), 2) AS [PPA Revenue]
FROM shared.customer c
JOIN salesfabric.[order] o
    ON c.CustomerId = o.CustomerId
WHERE o.OrderStatus = 'Completed'
GROUP BY c.CustomerRelationshipTypeId
ORDER BY [PPA Revenue] DESC;

fewShots.question: What renewable products contributed the most delivered quantity and settlement value?
fewShots.query:
-- Renewable product mix by delivered quantity
SELECT TOP 10
    ol.ProductName AS [Renewable Product],
    ROUND(SUM(ol.Quantity), 2) AS [Delivered Quantity],
    ROUND(SUM(ol.LineTotal), 2) AS [Settlement Value]
FROM salesfabric.orderline ol
JOIN salesfabric.[order] o
    ON ol.OrderId = o.OrderId
WHERE o.OrderStatus = 'Completed'
GROUP BY ol.ProductName
ORDER BY [Delivered Quantity] DESC;

fewShots.question: How are renewable settlement invoices trending by month and invoice status?
fewShots.query:
-- Renewable settlement invoice trend by month and status
SELECT
    YEAR(i.InvoiceDate) AS [Invoice Year],
    MONTH(i.InvoiceDate) AS [Invoice Month],
    i.InvoiceStatus AS [Invoice Status],
    COUNT(i.InvoiceId) AS [Invoice Count],
    ROUND(SUM(i.TotalAmount), 2) AS [Settlement Amount]
FROM finance.invoice i
GROUP BY YEAR(i.InvoiceDate), MONTH(i.InvoiceDate), i.InvoiceStatus
ORDER BY [Invoice Year], [Invoice Month], [Invoice Status];

fewShots.question: Show monthly PPA revenue and delivered quantity for completed renewable energy commitments.
fewShots.query:
-- Monthly renewable delivery and PPA revenue
SELECT
    YEAR(o.OrderDate) AS [Delivery Year],
    MONTH(o.OrderDate) AS [Delivery Month],
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.OrderId) AS [Completed Commitments],
    ROUND(SUM(ol.Quantity), 2) AS [Delivered Quantity],
    ROUND(SUM(o.OrderTotal), 2) AS [PPA Revenue]
FROM salesfabric.[order] o
JOIN salesfabric.orderline ol
    ON o.OrderId = ol.OrderId
WHERE o.OrderStatus = 'Completed'
GROUP BY YEAR(o.OrderDate), MONTH(o.OrderDate)
ORDER BY [Delivery Year], [Delivery Month];
